title: Volgograd、Volgograd Oblast — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Volgograd、Volgograd Oblast的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Volgograd是Volgograd Oblast的一個城市，人口約1,010,000。Formerly Stalingrad, a heroic city on the Volga River known for its WWII memorial on Mamayev Kurgan and the Battle of Stalingrad history.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
